pilotRole: Prove luminous and translucent reef materials remain premium without overpowering board contrast.

identity.biome: Luminous reef architecture, ceremonial crowns, shell amphitheaters, and layered aquatic light
identity.distortion: Harmony has become loss of authentic voice

motifs: one true note inside a chorus
restorationChange: Uniform crown-song light separates into distinct harmonious colors and individual reef lights answer one another.

landmarks.visual: Reef cradles with shell microphones, pearl lights, and individual echo chambers.
Coral risers shaped for call, response, solo, and rest.
Playful current forks, miniature crowns, and signal-splitting water channels.
Shell phonograph reef preserving distinct songs as luminous grooves.

boss.name: Thalassa
boss.visual: Regal reef guardian with crown-like coral silhouette and layered voice-light, majestic rather than monstrous.

arena.name: Crown Amphitheater
arena.visual: Luminous shell amphitheater whose crown geometry gathers many distinct colored waveforms.
